category_sources: Official documentation at https://docs.memcached.org/ describes memcached as an in-memory key-value store for small arbitrary data.
source_facts.description says "High performance, distributed memory object caching system".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and docs use the display name Memcached.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to memcached.org/about, tutorial, wiki, and timeouts as documentation resources.
Official memcached wiki says the documentation site is https://docs.memcached.org.
repo_sources: Official GitHub organization page lists memcached/memcached as the public development tree.
Official GitHub repository https://github.com/memcached/memcached identifies itself as the memcached development tree.
tags_sources: Official docs describe memcached as an in-memory key-value store and developer tool.
source_facts.description identifies a distributed memory object caching system.
